facets.name: absorbs
data: game.html — mountWorldLayout boundary clamp + GTAPhysics.resolveAABBMove buildingBlockers (line 1834). Substrate replacement: pure collider Things with no mesh — invisible walls. The aabb-collision facet on movers (hero, vehicles, future NPCs) already handles them via byFacet('collider').

data.comment: No tuning today — each wall declares its own half-extents in the spawn data. Future variants: angled-wall (rotated), one-way-wall (movers pass one direction), force-field (visible-on-impact).
